name: Lebanon County Peach Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift and mix together the dry ingredients (except the topping ingredients). Cut in the shortening and add the egg and milk which have been mixed together. Mix thoroughly.
2. Pour into a well-greased oblong pan and cover with peeled peach halves. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.
3. Bake at 350°F about 35 minutes.
